  154.  sealed trait AViolatedTransportMode extends VehicleNoticeDetail with ApiModel
  155.  sealed trait AViolatedTransportModeTransit extends TransitNoticeDetail with ApiModel
  156.  sealed trait AViolatedTruckRoadType extends VehicleNoticeDetail with ApiModel
  157.  sealed trait AViolatedZoneReference extends VehicleNoticeDetail with ApiModel
  158.  sealed trait AWaitAction extends VehiclePostAction with ApiModel
  159.  sealed trait AWaitPedestrianAction extends PedestrianPostAction with ApiModel
  160.  sealed trait AWebLink extends ApiModel
  161.  sealed trait AWebLinkWithDeviceType extends ApiModel
  162.  case class AccessPointPlace(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: Type, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, displayLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None, wheelchairAccessible: Option[Accessibility] = None) extends AAccessPointPlace with Product with Serializable

    Access point to a venue/station

  163.  case class AccessPointPlacePedestrian(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: Type, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, displayLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None, wheelchairAccessible: Option[Accessibility] = None) extends AAccessPointPlacePedestrian with Product with Serializable

    Access point to a venue/station

  164.  case class Agency(id: String, name: String, website: Option[String] = None) extends AAgency with Product with Serializable

    Contains information about a particular agency.

  165.  case class Allow(hov: Option[Boolean] = None, hot: Option[Boolean] = None) extends AAllow with Product with Serializable

    Explicitly allow features that require users to opt in.

  166.  trait Area extends ApiModel
  167.  trait AreaPost extends ApiModel
  168.  case class ArriveAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None) extends AArriveAction with Product with Serializable

    An arrival maneuver to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

  169.  case class ArrivePedestrianAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None) extends AArrivePedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

    An arrival maneuver to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

  170.  case class ArriveTransitAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None) extends AArriveTransitAction with Product with Serializable

    An arrival maneuver to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

  171.  case class Attribution(id: String, href: Option[String] = None, text: String, hrefText: Option[String] = None, type: Option[Type] = None) extends AAttribution with Product with Serializable

    The URL address to an external resource.

  172.  case class AuthErrorResponseSchema(error: Option[String] = None, errorUnderscoredescription: Option[String] = None) extends AAuthErrorResponseSchema with Product with Serializable

  173.  case class Avoid(features: Option[String] = None, areas: Option[String] = None, segments: Option[String] = None, zoneCategories: Option[String] = None, zoneIdentifiers: Option[String] = None, truckRoadTypes: Option[String] = None, tollTransponders: Option[String] = None) extends AAvoid with Product with Serializable

  174.  case class AvoidPost(segments: Option[Seq[String]] = None, areas: Option[Seq[AreaPost]] = None) extends AAvoidPost with Product with Serializable

    Avoid routes that violate certain features of road network or that go through user-specified geographical bounding boxes.

    Avoid routes that violate certain features of road network or that go through user-specified geographical bounding boxes. For the general description of the functionality please refer to the avoid parameter of the query string. Passing parameters in the POST body is suggested when the length of the parameters exceeds the limitation of the GET request.

  175.  case class AxleGroupWeight(maxWeight: Option[Int] = None, axleGroup: Option[String] = None) extends AAxleGroupWeight with Product with Serializable

    Contains the maximum allowed weight for an axle-group.

  176.  case class BaseAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None) extends ABaseAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to be performed between sections or during a section.

  177.  case class BaseNoticeDetail(title: Option[String] = None, cause: Option[String] = None, type: String) extends ABaseNoticeDetail with Product with Serializable

  178.  case class BaseSummary(duration: Int, length: Int, baseDuration: Option[Int] = None) extends ABaseSummary with Product with Serializable

    Total value of key attributes for a route section.

  179.  case class BoardAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None) extends ABoardAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to board a ferry.

  180.  case class BoundingBoxArea(type: String, north: Double, south: Double, east: Double, west: Double) extends ABoundingBoxArea with Product with Serializable

    A bounding box defined by two longitudes and two latitudes.

  181.  case class BoundingBoxAreaWithExceptions(type: String, north: Double, south: Double, east: Double, west: Double, exceptions: Option[Seq[Area]] = None) extends ABoundingBoxAreaWithExceptions with Product with Serializable

    A bounding box defined by two longitudes and two latitudes.

    A bounding box defined by two longitudes and two latitudes. Can be expanded to include excepted areas that are excluded from the current bounding box area.

  182.  case class CalculateRoutesPostParameters(avoid: Option[AvoidPost] = None, exclude: Option[ExcludePost] = None, ev: Option[EVPost] = None, maxSpeedOnSegment: Option[Seq[MaxSpeedOnSegmentPostInner]] = None) extends ACalculateRoutesPostParameters with Product with Serializable

    Parameters of the POST body for route calculation

  183.  case class ChargePointOperator(id: Option[String] = None, name: Option[String] = None) extends AChargePointOperator with Product with Serializable

    Information about the charging station charge-point-operator

  184.  case class ChargingAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, consumablePower: Option[Double] = None, arrivalCharge: Option[Double] = None, targetCharge: Option[Double] = None) extends AChargingAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to charge the vehicle.

  185.  case class ChargingConnectorAttributes(power: Double, current: Option[Double] = None, voltage: Option[Double] = None, supplyType: String, connectorType: String) extends AChargingConnectorAttributes with Product with Serializable

    Details of the connector that is suggested to be used in the section's postAction for charging.

  186.  case class ChargingSetupAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None) extends AChargingSetupAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to prepare for vehicle charging.

    An action to prepare for vehicle charging. Represents the time spent setting up for charging (e.g., payment processing), independent of the time required to actually charge the vehicle.

  187.  case class ChargingStationBrand(name: Option[String] = None, hrn: Option[String] = None) extends AChargingStationBrand with Product with Serializable

    Information regarding the charging station brand

  188.  case class ChargingStationPlace(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: Type, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, displayLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None, id: Option[String] = None, attributes: Option[ChargingConnectorAttributes] = None, brand: Option[ChargingStationBrand] = None, chargePointOperator: Option[ChargePointOperator] = None, matchingEMobilityServiceProviders: Option[Seq[EMobilityServiceProvider]] = None) extends AChargingStationPlace with Product with Serializable

    A charging station

  189.  case class ChargingStationPlacePedestrian(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: Type, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, displayLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None, id: Option[String] = None, attributes: Option[ChargingConnectorAttributes] = None, brand: Option[ChargingStationBrand] = None, chargePointOperator: Option[ChargePointOperator] = None, matchingEMobilityServiceProviders: Option[Seq[EMobilityServiceProvider]] = None) extends AChargingStationPlacePedestrian with Product with Serializable

    A charging station

  190.  case class ContinueAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None) extends AContinueAction with Product with Serializable

    A continue operation to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

  191.  case class ContinuePedestrianAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None) extends AContinuePedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

    A continue operation to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

  192.  case class ContinueTransitAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None) extends AContinueTransitAction with Product with Serializable

    A continue operation to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

  193.  case class Coordinate(lat: Double, lng: Double) extends ACoordinate with Product with Serializable

  194.  case class CorridorArea(type: String, polyline: Seq[Coordinate], radius: Int) extends ACorridorArea with Product with Serializable

    A polyline with a specified radius in meters that defines an area.

  195.  case class CorridorAreaWithExceptions(type: String, polyline: Seq[Coordinate], radius: Int, exceptions: Option[Seq[Area]] = None) extends ACorridorAreaWithExceptions with Product with Serializable

    A polyline with a specified radius in meters that defines an area.

    A polyline with a specified radius in meters that defines an area. Can be expanded to include excepted areas that are excluded from the current corridor area.

  196.  case class DataVersion(name: String, version: String) extends ADataVersion with Product with Serializable

    Version of a specific data set

    An action to disembark a ferry.

  198.  case class DeboardPedestrianAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None) extends ADeboardPedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to disembark a ferry.

  199.  case class DeboardTransitAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None) extends ADeboardTransitAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to disembark a ferry.

  200.  case class DefaultArea() extends Area with ApiModel with Product with Serializable
  201.  case class DefaultAreaPost() extends AreaPost with ApiModel with Product with Serializable
  202.  case class DefaultFarePrice() extends FarePrice with ApiModel with Product with Serializable

  211.  case class DefaultTransitPostAction() extends TransitPostAction with ApiModel with Product with Serializable
  212.  case class DefaultTransitPreAction() extends TransitPreAction with ApiModel with Product with Serializable
  213.  case class DefaultTransitTurnByTurnAction() extends TransitTurnByTurnAction with ApiModel with Product with Serializable
  214.  case class DefaultVehicleAction() extends VehicleAction with ApiModel with Product with Serializable
  215.  case class DefaultVehicleNoticeDetail() extends VehicleNoticeDetail with ApiModel with Product with Serializable

  217.  case class DefaultVehiclePostAction() extends VehiclePostAction with ApiModel with Product with Serializable
  218.  case class DepartAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None) extends ADepartAction with Product with Serializable

    A departure maneuver to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

  219.  case class DepartPedestrianAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None) extends ADepartPedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

    A departure maneuver to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

  220.  case class DepartPostTransitAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None) extends ADepartPostTransitAction with Product with Serializable

    A departure maneuver to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

  221.  case class DepartTransitAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None) extends ADepartTransitAction with Product with Serializable

    A departure maneuver to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

  222.  case class DockingStationPlace(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: Type, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, displayLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None) extends ADockingStationPlace with Product with Serializable

    A place represents a docking station for rented vehicles.

  223.  case class DockingStationPlacePedestrian(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: Type, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, displayLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None) extends ADockingStationPlacePedestrian with Product with Serializable

    A place represents a docking station for rented vehicles.

  224.  case class Driver(schedule: Option[String] = None) extends ADriver with Product with Serializable

    Driver parameters to be used for calculating routes with automatically added rest stops.

  225.  case class DynamicSpeedInfo(trafficSpeed: Double, baseSpeed: Double, turnTime: Int) extends ADynamicSpeedInfo with Product with Serializable

    Describes dynamic speed information, such as traffic speed, estimated speed without traffic, and turn time.

  226.  case class EMobilityServiceProvider(id: Option[String] = None, name: Option[String] = None) extends AEMobilityServiceProvider with Product with Serializable

    Information about E-Mobility Service Provider

  227.  case class EV(makeReachable: Option[Boolean] = None, preferredBrands: Option[String] = None, excludeChargingStations: Option[String] = None, excludeChargePointOperators: Option[String] = None, preferredChargePointOperators: Option[String] = None, eMobilityServiceProviderPreferences: Option[String] = None, allowCarChargingStations: Option[Boolean] = None, freeFlowSpeedTable: String, trafficSpeedTable: Option[String] = None, ascent: Option[Double] = None, descent: Option[Double] = None, auxiliaryConsumption: Option[Double] = None, initialCharge: Option[Double] = None, maxCharge: Option[Double] = None, chargingCurve: Option[String] = None, maxChargingVoltage: Option[Double] = None, maxChargingCurrent: Option[Double] = None, maxChargeAfterChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtFirstChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtDestination: Option[Double] = None, chargingSetupDuration: Option[Int] = None, maxChargingDuration: Option[Int] = None, connectorTypes: Option[String] = None, maxPowerAtLowVoltage: Option[Double] = None, driveEfficiency: Double, recuperationEfficiency: Double, auxiliaryPowerConsumption: Option[Double] = None, airDensity: Option[Double] = None, auxiliaryPowerCurve: Option[String] = None) extends AEV with Product with Serializable

    EV properties to be used for calculating consumption.

    EV properties to be used for calculating consumption. There are two consumption models (empirical, physical). Set the consumptionModel parameter to choose which model to use. Required empirical model properties: * freeFlowSpeedTable Required physical model properties: * driveEfficiency * recuperationEfficiency When using the physical model, certain properties of the vehicle parameter are also required (see documentation for the vehicle parameter for more details): * rollingResistanceCoefficient * airDragCoefficient * currentWeight * frontalArea or combination of width and height The following ev properties are additionally required in order to calculate State-of-Charge along the route: * initialCharge * maxCharge Route reachability based on State-of-Charge will be evaluated for the following constraints, if additionally provided, * minChargeAtDestination * minChargeAtFirstChargingStation * minChargeAtChargingStation The following properties are additionally required in order to calculate charging at charging station waypoints (see documentation for via parameter) * chargingCurve **Notes**: * Hybrid vehicles (EV + Other fuel types) are not supported. Consumption properties are not supported for combination of ev and fuel vehicles. * EV parameters are not supported in combination with pedestrian and bicycle transportMode. The following properties are additionally required for the router to automatically enhance the route with charging stops * makeReachable set to true * chargingCurve * connectorTypes * maxChargeAfterChargingStation

  228.  case class EVConsumption(freeFlowSpeedTable: String, trafficSpeedTable: Option[String] = None, ascent: Option[Double] = None, descent: Option[Double] = None, auxiliaryConsumption: Option[Double] = None, initialCharge: Option[Double] = None, maxCharge: Option[Double] = None, chargingCurve: Option[String] = None, maxChargingVoltage: Option[Double] = None, maxChargingCurrent: Option[Double] = None, maxChargeAfterChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtFirstChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtDestination: Option[Double] = None, chargingSetupDuration: Option[Int] = None, maxChargingDuration: Option[Int] = None, connectorTypes: Option[String] = None, maxPowerAtLowVoltage: Option[Double] = None, driveEfficiency: Double, recuperationEfficiency: Double, auxiliaryPowerConsumption: Option[Double] = None, airDensity: Option[Double] = None, auxiliaryPowerCurve: Option[String] = None) extends AEVConsumption with Product with Serializable

    EV properties to be used for calculating consumption.

    EV properties to be used for calculating consumption. There are two consumption models (empirical, physical). Set the consumptionModel parameter to choose which model to use. Required empirical model properties: * freeFlowSpeedTable Required physical model properties: * driveEfficiency * recuperationEfficiency When using the physical model, certain properties of the vehicle parameter are also required (see documentation for the vehicle parameter for more details): * rollingResistanceCoefficient * airDragCoefficient * currentWeight * frontalArea or combination of width and height The following ev properties are additionally required in order to calculate State-of-Charge along the route: * initialCharge * maxCharge Route reachability based on State-of-Charge will be evaluated for the following constraints, if additionally provided, * minChargeAtDestination * minChargeAtFirstChargingStation * minChargeAtChargingStation The following properties are additionally required in order to calculate charging at charging station waypoints (see documentation for via parameter) * chargingCurve **Notes**: * Hybrid vehicles (EV + Other fuel types) are not supported. Consumption properties are not supported for combination of ev and fuel vehicles. * EV parameters are not supported in combination with pedestrian and bicycle transportMode.

  229.  case class EVEmpiricalModel(freeFlowSpeedTable: String, trafficSpeedTable: Option[String] = None, ascent: Option[Double] = None, descent: Option[Double] = None, auxiliaryConsumption: Option[Double] = None, initialCharge: Option[Double] = None, maxCharge: Option[Double] = None, chargingCurve: Option[String] = None, maxChargingVoltage: Option[Double] = None, maxChargingCurrent: Option[Double] = None, maxChargeAfterChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtFirstChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtDestination: Option[Double] = None, chargingSetupDuration: Option[Int] = None, maxChargingDuration: Option[Int] = None, connectorTypes: Option[String] = None, maxPowerAtLowVoltage: Option[Double] = None) extends AEVEmpiricalModel with Product with Serializable

    Specifies parameters required for calculation of energy consumption for electric vehicles using the Empirical model.

  230.  case class EVPhysicalModel(driveEfficiency: Double, recuperationEfficiency: Double, auxiliaryPowerConsumption: Option[Double] = None, airDensity: Option[Double] = None, auxiliaryPowerCurve: Option[String] = None, initialCharge: Option[Double] = None, maxCharge: Option[Double] = None, chargingCurve: Option[String] = None, maxChargingVoltage: Option[Double] = None, maxChargingCurrent: Option[Double] = None, maxChargeAfterChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtFirstChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtDestination: Option[Double] = None, chargingSetupDuration: Option[Int] = None, maxChargingDuration: Option[Int] = None, connectorTypes: Option[String] = None, maxPowerAtLowVoltage: Option[Double] = None) extends AEVPhysicalModel with Product with Serializable

    Specifies parameters required for calculation of energy consumption for electric vehicles using physical model.

  231.  case class EVPost(preferredBrands: Option[Seq[String]] = None, preferredChargePointOperators: Option[Seq[String]] = None) extends AEVPost with Product with Serializable

  232.  case class EVRouteHandle(eMobilityServiceProviderPreferences: Option[String] = None, freeFlowSpeedTable: String, trafficSpeedTable: Option[String] = None, ascent: Option[Double] = None, descent: Option[Double] = None, auxiliaryConsumption: Option[Double] = None, initialCharge: Option[Double] = None, maxCharge: Option[Double] = None, chargingCurve: Option[String] = None, maxChargingVoltage: Option[Double] = None, maxChargingCurrent: Option[Double] = None, maxChargeAfterChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtFirstChargingStation: Option[Double] = None, minChargeAtDestination: Option[Double] = None, chargingSetupDuration: Option[Int] = None, maxChargingDuration: Option[Int] = None, connectorTypes: Option[String] = None, maxPowerAtLowVoltage: Option[Double] = None, driveEfficiency: Double, recuperationEfficiency: Double, auxiliaryPowerConsumption: Option[Double] = None, airDensity: Option[Double] = None, auxiliaryPowerCurve: Option[String] = None) extends AEVRouteHandle with Product with Serializable

    EV properties to be used for calculating consumption.

    EV properties to be used for calculating consumption. There are two consumption models (empirical, physical). Set the consumptionModel parameter to choose which model to use. Required empirical model properties: * freeFlowSpeedTable Required physical model properties: * driveEfficiency * recuperationEfficiency When using the physical model, certain properties of the vehicle parameter are also required (see documentation for the vehicle parameter for more details): * rollingResistanceCoefficient * airDragCoefficient * currentWeight * frontalArea or combination of width and height The following ev properties are additionally required in order to calculate State-of-Charge along the route: * initialCharge * maxCharge Route reachability based on State-of-Charge will be evaluated for the following constraints, if additionally provided, * minChargeAtDestination * minChargeAtFirstChargingStation * minChargeAtChargingStation The following properties are additionally required in order to calculate charging at charging station waypoints (see documentation for via parameter) * chargingCurve **Notes**: * Hybrid vehicles (EV + Other fuel types) are not supported. Consumption properties are not supported for combination of ev and fuel vehicles. * EV parameters are not supported in combination with pedestrian and bicycle transportMode.

  233.  case class EncodedCorridorArea(type: String, polyline: String, radius: Int) extends AEncodedCorridorArea with Product with Serializable

    A polygon defined as a [Flexible Polyline](https://github.com/heremaps/flexible-polyline) encoded string and with a specified radius that defines an area.

  234.  case class EncodedCorridorAreaWithExceptions(type: String, polyline: String, radius: Int, exceptions: Option[Seq[Area]] = None) extends AEncodedCorridorAreaWithExceptions with Product with Serializable

    A polygon defined as a [Flexible Polyline](https://github.com/heremaps/flexible-polyline) encoded string and with a specified radius that defines an area.

    A polygon defined as a [Flexible Polyline](https://github.com/heremaps/flexible-polyline) encoded string and with a specified radius that defines an area. Can be expanded to include excepted areas that are excluded from the current corridor area.

  235.  case class EncodedPolygonArea(type: String, outer: String) extends AEncodedPolygonArea with Product with Serializable

    A polygon defined as a [Flexible Polyline](https://github.com/heremaps/flexible-polyline) encoded string.

    A polygon defined as a [Flexible Polyline](https://github.com/heremaps/flexible-polyline) encoded string. The polygon is automatically closed, so repeating the first vertex is not required.

  236.  case class EncodedPolygonAreaWithExceptions(type: String, outer: String, exceptions: Option[Seq[Area]] = None) extends AEncodedPolygonAreaWithExceptions with Product with Serializable

    A polygon defined as a [Flexible Polyline](https://github.com/heremaps/flexible-polyline) encoded string.

    A polygon defined as a [Flexible Polyline](https://github.com/heremaps/flexible-polyline) encoded string. Can be expanded to include excepted areas that are excluded from the current polygon area.

  237.  case class ErrorResponse(title: String, status: Int, code: String, cause: String, action: String, correlationId: String) extends AErrorResponse with Product with Serializable

    Response in case of error

  238.  case class Exclude(countries: Option[String] = None, states: Option[String] = None, areas: Option[String] = None) extends AExclude with Product with Serializable

    Options to exclude strictly during the route calculation.

  239.  case class ExcludePost(areas: Option[Seq[AreaPost]] = None) extends AExcludePost with Product with Serializable

    User-specified properties that need to be strictly excluded during route calculation.

    User-specified properties that need to be strictly excluded during route calculation. For the general description of the functionality please refer to the exclude parameter of the query string. Passing parameters in the POST body is suggested when the length of the parameters exceeds the limitation of the GET request.

  240.  case class ExitAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None, exit: Option[Int] = None, roundaboutAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends AExitAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to leave a highway or roundabout.

    An action to leave a highway or roundabout. * exit: exit maneuver, such as \"Take the left exit to\" * roundaboutExit: roundabout exit maneuver, such as \"Take the third exit of the roundabout onto\"

  241.  case class ExitInfo(number: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None) extends AExitInfo with Product with Serializable

    Exit information attached to an offset action

  242.  case class ExitPedestrianAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None, exit: Option[Int] = None, roundaboutAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends AExitPedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to leave a highway or roundabout.

    An action to leave a highway or roundabout. * exit: exit maneuver, such as \"Take the left exit to\" * roundaboutExit: roundabout exit maneuver, such as \"Take the third exit of the roundabout onto\"

  243.  case class Fare(id: String, name: String, price: FarePrice, convertedPrice: Option[FarePrice] = None, reason: Option[String] = None, paymentMethods: Option[Set[String]] = None, pass: Option[FarePass] = None, applicableTimes: Option[String] = None, transponders: Option[Seq[TransponderSystem]] = None) extends AFare with Product with Serializable

    \"Fare type contains information about a single fare or ticket needed for this section of the route.\" **NOTE**: Fares information support will be available soon.

  244.  case class FarePass(returnJourney: Option[Boolean] = None, validityPeriod: Option[FarePassValidityPeriod] = None, travels: Option[Int] = None, transfers: Option[Int] = None, seniorPass: Option[Boolean] = None) extends AFarePass with Product with Serializable

    Specifies whether this Fare is a multi-travel pass, and its characteristics

  245.  case class FarePassValidityPeriod(period: String, count: Option[Int] = None) extends AFarePassValidityPeriod with Product with Serializable

    Specifies a temporal validity period for a pass

  246.  trait FarePrice extends ApiModel
  247.  case class Fuel(type: String, freeFlowSpeedTable: Option[String] = None, trafficSpeedTable: Option[String] = None, additionalConsumption: Option[Double] = None, ascent: Option[Double] = None) extends AFuel with Product with Serializable

    **Disclaimer: This parameter is currently in beta release, and is therefore subject to breaking changes.** Fuel parameters to be used for calculating consumption and related CO2 emission, and toll calculation.

    **Disclaimer: This parameter is currently in beta release, and is therefore subject to breaking changes.** Fuel parameters to be used for calculating consumption and related CO2 emission, and toll calculation. The following attributes are required for calculating consumption: * type * freeFlowSpeedTable The following attribute is needed for fuel specific toll calculation (if not provided default toll instead of fuel specific toll will be returned): * type **Notes**: * Hybrid vehicles (EV + Other fuel types) are not supported. Consumption properties are not supported for combination of ev and fuel vehicles. * Fuel parameters are not supported in combination with pedestrian and bicycle transportMode.

  248.  case class GetRoutesByHandlePostParameters(avoid: Option[AvoidPost] = None, exclude: Option[ExcludePost] = None, maxSpeedOnSegment: Option[Seq[MaxSpeedOnSegmentPostInner]] = None) extends AGetRoutesByHandlePostParameters with Product with Serializable

    Parameters of the POST body for get route by handle

  249.  case class HealthResponseFailSchema(status: Option[Status] = None) extends AHealthResponseFailSchema with Product with Serializable

    Returns the health of the service

  250.  case class HealthResponseOKSchema(status: Option[Status] = None) extends AHealthResponseOKSchema with Product with Serializable

    Returns the health of the service

  251.  case class LicensePlateRestriction(type: Option[String] = None, forbiddenCharacters: Option[Seq[String]] = None) extends ALicensePlateRestriction with Product with Serializable

    Contains details of the violated license plate restriction.

  252.  case class LocalizedRouteNumber(value: String, language: Option[String] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, routeType: Option[Int] = None) extends ALocalizedRouteNumber with Product with Serializable

    Represents a route number in specific language with optional cardinal direction and route level.

  253.  case class LocalizedString(value: String, language: Option[String] = None) extends ALocalizedString with Product with Serializable

    String with optional language code.

  254.  case class Location(lat: Double, lng: Double, elv: Option[Double] = None) extends ALocation with Product with Serializable

    Location on the Earth

  255.  case class MatchTrace(trace: Seq[MatchTracePoint], via: Option[Seq[MatchTraceVia]] = None) extends AMatchTrace with Product with Serializable

    Trace file with points and path match parameters

  256.  case class MatchTracePoint(lat: Double, lng: Double) extends AMatchTracePoint with Product with Serializable

    GPS probe point with parameters relevant to path or route matching

  257.  case class MatchTraceVia(index: Int, stopDuration: Option[Int] = None) extends AMatchTraceVia with Product with Serializable

    Via waypoint in the middle of route

  258.  case class MaxSpeed() extends AMaxSpeed with Product with Serializable

    Speed in meters per second, or \"unlimited\" indicating that the speed is unlimited, e.g., on a German autobahn

  259.  case class MaxSpeedOnSegmentPostInner(segment: Option[String] = None, speed: Option[Double] = None) extends AMaxSpeedOnSegmentPostInner with Product with Serializable

  260.  case class Notice(title: Option[String] = None, code: String, severity: Option[Severity] = None, details: Option[Seq[BaseNoticeDetail]] = None) extends ANotice with Product with Serializable

    A notice contains important notifications.

  261.  case class OffsetAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None) extends AOffsetAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

  262.  case class OffsetPedestrianAction(action: String, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None) extends AOffsetPedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

    An action to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

  263.  case class ParkingLotPlace(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: Type, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, displayLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None, id: Option[String] = None, attributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, rates: Option[Seq[TimeRestrictedPrice]] = None) extends AParkingLotPlace with Product with Serializable

    A parking lot

  264.  case class ParkingLotPlacePedestrian(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: Type, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, displayLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None, id: Option[String] = None, attributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, rates: Option[Seq[TimeRestrictedPrice]] = None) extends AParkingLotPlacePedestrian with Product with Serializable

    A parking lot

  265.  case class Passthrough(place: Place, offset: Option[Double] = None) extends APassthrough with Product with Serializable

    Describes a location and time the section is passing through.

  266.  trait PedestrianAction extends ApiModel
  267.  case class PedestrianDeparture(time: Option[OffsetDateTime] = None, place: PedestrianPlace) extends APedestrianDeparture with Product with Serializable

    Departure of pedestrian

  268.  case class PedestrianNotice(title: Option[String] = None, code: String, severity: Option[Severity] = None, details: Option[Seq[BaseNoticeDetail]] = None) extends APedestrianNotice with Product with Serializable

    A notice contains important notifications.

  269.  trait PedestrianPlace extends ApiModel
  270.  trait PedestrianPostAction extends ApiModel
  271.  case class PedestrianSection(id: String, type: Type, preActions: Option[Seq[BaseAction]] = None, actions: Option[Seq[PedestrianAction]] = None, language: Option[String] = None, postActions: Option[Seq[PedestrianPostAction]] = None, turnByTurnActions: Option[Seq[OffsetAction]] = None, departure: PedestrianDeparture, arrival: PedestrianDeparture, passthrough: Option[Seq[Passthrough]] = None, summary: Option[PedestrianSummary] = None, travelSummary: Option[BaseSummary] = None, polyline: Option[String] = None, notices: Option[Seq[PedestrianNotice]] = None, transport: PedestrianTransport, spans: Option[Seq[PedestrianSpan]] = None, refReplacements: Option[Map[String, String]] = None) extends APedestrianSection with Product with Serializable

    Represent a section of a route

  272.  case class PedestrianSpan(offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, duration: Option[Int] = None, streetAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, walkAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, carAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, truckAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, scooterAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, names: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, routeNumbers: Option[Seq[LocalizedRouteNumber]] = None, countryCode: Option[String] = None, stateCode: Option[String] = None, functionalClass: Option[Int] = None, speedLimit: Option[Double] = None, maxSpeed: Option[MaxSpeed] = None, dynamicSpeedInfo: Option[DynamicSpeedInfo] = None, segmentId: Option[String] = None, segmentRef: Option[String] = None, baseDuration: Option[Int] = None, typicalDuration: Option[Int] = None, incidents: Option[Seq[Int]] = None) extends APedestrianSpan with Product with Serializable

    Span attached to a Section describing pedestrian content.

  273.  case class PedestrianSummary(duration: Int, length: Int, baseDuration: Option[Int] = None) extends APedestrianSummary with Product with Serializable

    Total value of key attributes for a route section.

  274.  case class PedestrianTransport(mode: String, name: Option[String] = None) extends APedestrianTransport with Product with Serializable

    Information about a transport

  275.  case class Place(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: Type, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, displayLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None) extends APlace with Product with Serializable

    A place represents a generic location relevant for the route.

  276.  case class PlacePedestrian(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: Type, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, displayLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None) extends APlacePedestrian with Product with Serializable

    A place represents a generic location relevant for the route.

  277.  case class PlaceTransit(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: Type, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, displayLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None) extends APlaceTransit with Product with Serializable

    A place represents a generic location relevant for the route.

  278.  case class PolygonArea(type: String, outer: Seq[Coordinate]) extends APolygonArea with Product with Serializable

    A polygon defined as a list of coordinates.

    A polygon defined as a list of coordinates. The polygon is automatically closed, so repeating the first vertex is not required. Self-intersecting polygons are not supported.

  279.  case class PolygonAreaWithExceptions(type: String, outer: Seq[Coordinate], exceptions: Option[Seq[Area]] = None) extends APolygonAreaWithExceptions with Product with Serializable

    A polygon defined as a list of coordinates.

    A polygon defined as a list of coordinates. Self-intersecting polygons are not supported. Can be expanded to include excepted areas that are excluded from the current polygon area.

  280.  case class RangePrice(type: String, estimated: Option[Boolean] = None, currency: String, unit: Option[Int] = None, minimum: Double, maximum: Double) extends ARangePrice with Product with Serializable

  281.  case class Rerouting(mode: Option[Mode] = None, lastTraveledSectionIndex: Option[Int] = None, traveledDistanceOnLastSection: Option[Int] = None) extends ARerouting with Product with Serializable

    Rerouting parameters allow to request a new route calculation based on the route handle.

    Rerouting parameters allow to request a new route calculation based on the route handle. All attributes are optional.

  282.  case class RoadInfo(type: Option[Type] = None, name: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, number: Option[Seq[LocalizedRouteNumber]] = None, toward: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None) extends ARoadInfo with Product with Serializable

    Road information attached to an offset action

  283.  case class RouteLabel(labelUnderscoretype: Option[LabelType] = None, name: Option[LocalizedString] = None) extends ARouteLabel with Product with Serializable

    Road name or route number distinguishing a route from other alternatives.

  284.  case class RouteResponseNotice(title: Option[String] = None, code: String, severity: Option[Severity] = None, details: Option[Seq[RouteResponseNoticeDetail]] = None) extends ARouteResponseNotice with Product with Serializable

    A notice contains important notifications.

  285.  trait RouteResponseNoticeDetail extends ApiModel
  286.  case class RouterRoute(id: String, notices: Option[Seq[Notice]] = None, sections: Seq[RouterSection], routeLabels: Option[Seq[RouteLabel]] = None, routeHandle: Option[String] = None) extends ARouterRoute with Product with Serializable

    A basic route.

    A basic route. Includes personal vehicles as car, truck, etc... For all modes, cf. transportMode.

  287.  case class RouterRouteResponse(notices: Option[Seq[RouteResponseNotice]] = None, routes: Seq[RouterRoute]) extends ARouterRouteResponse with Product with Serializable

    Returns a list of routes.

  288.  trait RouterSection extends ApiModel
  289.  case class Routing403ErrorResponseSchema(error: Option[String] = None, errorUnderscoredescription: Option[String] = None, title: String, status: Int, code: String, cause: String, action: String, correlationId: String) extends ARouting403ErrorResponseSchema with Product with Serializable

  290.  case class RoutingErrorResponse(title: String, status: Int, code: String, cause: String, action: String, correlationId: String) extends ARoutingErrorResponse with Product with Serializable

    Response in case of error

  291.  case class RoutingZone(ref: Option[String] = None, type: Option[String] = None, name: Option[String] = None, category: Option[String] = None) extends ARoutingZone with Product with Serializable

    Information about a routing zone.

  292.  case class Scooter(allowHighway: Option[Boolean] = None) extends AScooter with Product with Serializable

    Scooter-specific parameters

  293.  case class SignpostInfo(labels: Seq[SignpostLabel]) extends ASignpostInfo with Product with Serializable

    Signpost information attached to an offset action.

  294.  case class SignpostLabel(name: Option[LocalizedString] = None, routeNumber: Option[LocalizedRouteNumber] = None) extends ASignpostLabel with Product with Serializable

    Label on a signpost.

  295.  case class SignpostLabelRouteNumber(routeNumber: Option[LocalizedRouteNumber] = None) extends ASignpostLabelRouteNumber with Product with Serializable

    Route number on a signpost label.

    Route number on a signpost label. The routeType property of the LocalizedRouteNumber is always null at the moment for SignpostLabel, because the data is currently not available.

  296.  case class SignpostLabelText(name: Option[LocalizedString] = None) extends ASignpostLabelText with Product with Serializable

    Text on a signpost label.

  297.  case class SimpleTurnAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends ASimpleTurnAction with Product with Serializable

    Turn maneuver, such as \"Make a sharp right turn at\"

  298.  case class SimpleTurnPedestrianAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends ASimpleTurnPedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

    Turn maneuver, such as \"Make a sharp right turn at\"

  299.  case class SinglePrice(type: String, estimated: Option[Boolean] = None, currency: String, unit: Option[Int] = None, value: Double) extends ASinglePrice with Product with Serializable

  300.  case class StationPlace(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: Type, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, displayLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None, id: Option[String] = None, platform: Option[String] = None, code: Option[String] = None, wheelchairAccessible: Option[Accessibility] = None) extends AStationPlace with Product with Serializable

    A station

  301.  case class StationPlacePedestrian(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: Type, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, displayLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None, id: Option[String] = None, platform: Option[String] = None, code: Option[String] = None, wheelchairAccessible: Option[Accessibility] = None) extends AStationPlacePedestrian with Product with Serializable

    A station

  302.  case class StationPlaceTransit(name: Option[String] = None, waypoint: Option[Int] = None, type: Type, location: Location, originalLocation: Option[Location] = None, displayLocation: Option[Location] = None, sideOfStreet: Option[SideOfStreet] = None, id: Option[String] = None, platform: Option[String] = None, code: Option[String] = None, wheelchairAccessible: Option[Accessibility] = None) extends AStationPlaceTransit with Product with Serializable

    A station

  303.  case class Taxi(allowDriveThroughTaxiRoads: Option[Boolean] = None) extends ATaxi with Product with Serializable

    Taxi-specific parameters

  304.  case class TimeRestrictedPrice(type: String, estimated: Option[Boolean] = None, currency: String, unit: Option[Int] = None, value: Double, days: Option[Seq[Weekdays]] = None, minDuration: Option[Int] = None, maxDuration: Option[Int] = None, fromTime: Option[String] = None, toTime: Option[String] = None) extends ATimeRestrictedPrice with Product with Serializable

  305.  case class TollCollectionLocation(name: Option[String] = None, location: Location) extends ATollCollectionLocation with Product with Serializable

    Refers to the physical location where the toll is collected.

    Refers to the physical location where the toll is collected. This can include various structures such as toll booths, transponder readers, or number-plate cameras. It's important to note that certain toll collection methods, such as vignettes, do not have specific toll collection locations associated with them, and therefore this element will not be present at all. The value of this property is a Location that specifies the coordinates of the payment location.

  306.  case class TollCost(tollSystem: String, tollSystemRef: Int, tollSystems: Option[Seq[Int]] = None, countryCode: Option[String] = None, tollCollectionLocations: Option[Seq[TollCollectionLocation]] = None, fares: Seq[TollFare]) extends ATollCost with Product with Serializable

    Information for a single toll payment.

  307.  case class TollCountrySummary(countryCode: Option[String] = None, price: Option[FarePrice] = None) extends ATollCountrySummary with Product with Serializable

  308.  case class TollFare(id: String, name: String, price: FarePrice, convertedPrice: Option[FarePrice] = None, reason: Option[String] = None, paymentMethods: Option[Set[String]] = None, pass: Option[FarePass] = None, applicableTimes: Option[String] = None, transponders: Option[Seq[TransponderSystem]] = None) extends ATollFare with Product with Serializable

    Contains information about a single toll fare needed for this section of the route.

  309.  case class TollSummary(total: Option[FarePrice] = None, totalBySystem: Option[Seq[TollSystemSummary]] = None, totalByCountry: Option[Seq[TollCountrySummary]] = None) extends ATollSummary with Product with Serializable

    The summary of the tolls grouped by criteria (total, per system, per country).

  310.  case class TollSystem(id: Option[Int] = None, name: Option[String] = None) extends ATollSystem with Product with Serializable

    Information about a toll system collecting payments on the route.

  311.  case class TollSystemSummary(tollSystem: Option[Int] = None, price: Option[FarePrice] = None) extends ATollSystemSummary with Product with Serializable

  312.  case class Tolls(transponders: Option[String] = None, vignettes: Option[String] = None, summaries: Option[Seq[String]] = None, vehicleCategory: Option[String] = None, emissionType: Option[String] = None) extends ATolls with Product with Serializable

    Vehicle-independent options that may affect route toll calculation as well as options affecting the output of the tolls, such as summaries.

    Vehicle-independent options that may affect route toll calculation as well as options affecting the output of the tolls, such as summaries. Since this parameter controls behaviour related to tolls in the return part of the response, use of this parameter requires return=tolls to be selected.

  313.  case class Traffic(overrideFlowDuration: Option[Int] = None, mode: Option[Mode] = None) extends ATraffic with Product with Serializable

    Traffic specific parameters.

  314.  case class TrafficIncident(description: Option[String] = None, type: Option[String] = None, criticality: Option[Criticality] = None, validFrom: Option[OffsetDateTime] = None, validUntil: Option[OffsetDateTime] = None, id: Option[String] = None) extends ATrafficIncident with Product with Serializable

    An incident describes a temporary event on the road network.

    An incident describes a temporary event on the road network. It typically refers to a real world incident (accident, road construction, weather condition, etc.) on a street or street segment

  315.  case class TrailerCountRange(from: Option[Int] = None, to: Option[Int] = None) extends ATrailerCountRange with Product with Serializable

    Constrains the restriction to vehicles with the number of trailers within the specified range.

  316.  trait TransitAction extends ApiModel
  317.  case class TransitDeparture(time: Option[OffsetDateTime] = None, place: TransitDeparturePlace, charge: Option[Double] = None) extends ATransitDeparture with Product with Serializable

    Transit departure

  318.  trait TransitDeparturePlace extends ApiModel
  319.  case class TransitIncident(summary: Option[String] = None, description: Option[String] = None, type: String, effect: String, validFrom: Option[OffsetDateTime] = None, validUntil: Option[OffsetDateTime] = None, url: Option[String] = None) extends ATransitIncident with Product with Serializable

    An incident describes disruptions on the transit network.

    An incident describes disruptions on the transit network. Disruptions scale from delays to service cancellations.

  320.  case class TransitNotice(title: Option[String] = None, code: String, severity: Option[Severity] = None, details: Option[Seq[TransitNoticeDetail]] = None) extends ATransitNotice with Product with Serializable

    A notice contains important notifications.

  321.  trait TransitNoticeDetail extends ApiModel
  322.  trait TransitPostAction extends ApiModel
  323.  trait TransitPreAction extends ApiModel
  324.  case class TransitSection(id: String, type: Type, preActions: Option[Seq[TransitPreAction]] = None, actions: Option[Seq[TransitAction]] = None, language: Option[String] = None, postActions: Option[Seq[TransitPostAction]] = None, turnByTurnActions: Option[Seq[TransitTurnByTurnAction]] = None, departure: TransitDeparture, arrival: TransitDeparture, passthrough: Option[Seq[Passthrough]] = None, summary: Option[BaseSummary] = None, travelSummary: Option[BaseSummary] = None, polyline: Option[String] = None, notices: Option[Seq[TransitNotice]] = None, bookingLinks: Option[Seq[WebLinkWithDeviceType]] = None, transport: Option[TransitTransport] = None, intermediateStops: Option[Seq[TransitStop]] = None, agency: Option[Agency] = None, attributions: Option[Seq[Attribution]] = None, fares: Option[Seq[Fare]] = None, booking: Option[WebLink] = None, spans: Option[Seq[TransitSpan]] = None, refReplacements: Option[Map[String, String]] = None, incidents: Option[Seq[TransitIncident]] = None) extends ATransitSection with Product with Serializable

    A section of the route.

    A section of the route. It contains departure, arrival, and route information.

  325.  case class TransitSpan(offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, duration: Option[Int] = None, countryCode: Option[String] = None, stateCode: Option[String] = None, names: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, segmentId: Option[String] = None, segmentRef: Option[String] = None, notices: Option[Seq[Int]] = None) extends ATransitSpan with Product with Serializable

    Contains information attached to a contiguous part of a Section.

    Contains information attached to a contiguous part of a Section. The information may be attached along different dimensions of a section which are geometry (spatial), distance or time. A section, if it uses spans, has an optional attribute spans which is an array of extended Span types. The attributes of a span which should be returned in the response are configured by a request parameter. Use this type as a base for any span extension for sections that provide spans.

  326.  case class TransitStop(departure: TransitDeparture, duration: Option[Int] = None, transport: Option[TransitTransport] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, attributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None) extends ATransitStop with Product with Serializable

    A transit stop of the route

  327.  case class TransitTransport(mode: String, name: Option[String] = None, headsign: Option[String] = None, category: Option[String] = None, color: Option[String] = None, textColor: Option[String] = None, shortName: Option[String] = None, longName: Option[String] = None) extends ATransitTransport with Product with Serializable

    Transit transport information.

  328.  trait TransitTurnByTurnAction extends ApiModel
  329.  case class TransponderSystem(system: Option[String] = None) extends ATransponderSystem with Product with Serializable

    Transponder system for which a fare is applicable.

  330.  case class Truck(shippedHazardousGoods: Option[String] = None, grossWeight: Option[Int] = None, currentWeight: Option[Int] = None, emptyWeight: Option[Int] = None, weightPerAxle: Option[Int] = None, weightPerAxleGroup: Option[String] = None, height: Option[Int] = None, width: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, kpraLength: Option[Int] = None, payloadCapacity: Option[Int] = None, tunnelCategory: Option[Value] = None, axleCount: Option[Int] = None, trailerAxleCount: Option[Int] = None, tiresCount: Option[Int] = None, category: Option[Category] = None, trailerCount: Option[Int] = None, hovOccupancy: Option[Int] = None, licensePlate: Option[String] = None, speedCap: Option[Double] = None, speedCapPerFc: Option[String] = None, engineSizeCc: Option[Int] = None, occupancy: Option[Int] = None, engineType: Option[EngineType] = None, heightAboveFirstAxle: Option[Int] = None, frontalArea: Option[Double] = None, rollingResistanceCoefficient: Option[Double] = None, airDragCoefficient: Option[Double] = None, commercial: Option[Boolean] = None, type: Option[Default] = None) extends ATruck with Product with Serializable

    Vehicle-specific parameters

  331.  case class TruckAxleCountRange(from: Option[Int] = None, to: Option[Int] = None) extends ATruckAxleCountRange with Product with Serializable

    Constrains the restriction to trucks with the number of axles within the specified range.

  332.  case class TurnAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None, offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, currentRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, nextRoad: Option[RoadInfo] = None, exitSign: Option[ExitInfo] = None, signpost: Option[SignpostInfo] = None, intersectionName: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, direction: Option[Direction] = None, severity: Option[Severity] = None, turnAngle: Option[Double] = None) extends ATurnAction with Product with Serializable

    An action in which a direction change is made.

  333.  case class Vehicle(shippedHazardousGoods: Option[String] = None, grossWeight: Option[Int] = None, currentWeight: Option[Int] = None, emptyWeight: Option[Int] = None, weightPerAxle: Option[Int] = None, weightPerAxleGroup: Option[String] = None, height: Option[Int] = None, width: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, kpraLength: Option[Int] = None, payloadCapacity: Option[Int] = None, tunnelCategory: Option[Value] = None, axleCount: Option[Int] = None, trailerAxleCount: Option[Int] = None, tiresCount: Option[Int] = None, category: Option[Category] = None, trailerCount: Option[Int] = None, hovOccupancy: Option[Int] = None, licensePlate: Option[String] = None, speedCap: Option[Double] = None, speedCapPerFc: Option[String] = None, engineSizeCc: Option[Int] = None, occupancy: Option[Int] = None, engineType: Option[EngineType] = None, heightAboveFirstAxle: Option[Int] = None, frontalArea: Option[Double] = None, rollingResistanceCoefficient: Option[Double] = None, airDragCoefficient: Option[Double] = None, commercial: Option[Boolean] = None, type: Option[Value] = None) extends AVehicle with Product with Serializable

    Vehicle-specific parameters

  334.  trait VehicleAction extends ApiModel
  335.  case class VehicleDeparture(time: Option[OffsetDateTime] = None, place: VehiclePlace, charge: Option[Double] = None) extends AVehicleDeparture with Product with Serializable

    Describe a departure or arrival location and time.

  336.  case class VehicleNotice(title: Option[String] = None, code: String, severity: Option[Severity] = None, details: Option[Seq[VehicleNoticeDetail]] = None) extends AVehicleNotice with Product with Serializable

    A notice contains important notifications.

  337.  trait VehicleNoticeDetail extends ApiModel
  338.  trait VehiclePlace extends ApiModel
  339.  trait VehiclePostAction extends ApiModel
  340.  case class VehicleRestriction(title: Option[String] = None, cause: Option[String] = None, type: Type, forbiddenHazardousGoods: Option[Seq[String]] = None, maxWeight: Option[VehicleRestrictionMaxWeight] = None, maxGrossWeight: Option[Int] = None, maxWeightPerAxle: Option[Int] = None, maxAxleGroupWeight: Option[AxleGroupWeight] = None, maxHeight: Option[Int] = None, maxWidth: Option[Int] = None, maxLength: Option[Int] = None, maxTiresCount: Option[Int] = None, axleCount: Option[TruckAxleCountRange] = None, tunnelCategory: Option[Value] = None, timeDependent: Option[Boolean] = None, truckType: Option[Value] = None, vehicleType: Option[Value] = None, trailerCount: Option[TrailerCountRange] = None, maxEngineSizeCC: Option[Int] = None, minEngineSizeCC: Option[Int] = None, maxOccupancy: Option[Int] = None, minOccupancy: Option[Int] = None, restrictedTimes: Option[String] = None, maxKpraLength: Option[Int] = None, maxPayloadCapacity: Option[Int] = None, unconditional: Option[Boolean] = None) extends AVehicleRestriction with Product with Serializable

    Provides details about the violated restriction and the violated restriction conditions that were evaluated against parameter values set in the routing request (such as vehicle properties).

    Provides details about the violated restriction and the violated restriction conditions that were evaluated against parameter values set in the routing request (such as vehicle properties). The restriction is violated only if all of the conditions present are met.

  341.  case class VehicleRestrictionMaxWeight(value: Option[Int] = None, type: Option[String] = None) extends AVehicleRestrictionMaxWeight with Product with Serializable

    Contains the maximum permitted weight, specified in kilograms, along with the specific type of the maximum permitted weight restriction.

  342.  case class VehicleRestrictionTransit(title: Option[String] = None, cause: Option[String] = None, type: Type, forbiddenHazardousGoods: Option[Seq[String]] = None, maxWeight: Option[VehicleRestrictionMaxWeight] = None, maxGrossWeight: Option[Int] = None, maxWeightPerAxle: Option[Int] = None, maxAxleGroupWeight: Option[AxleGroupWeight] = None, maxHeight: Option[Int] = None, maxWidth: Option[Int] = None, maxLength: Option[Int] = None, maxTiresCount: Option[Int] = None, axleCount: Option[TruckAxleCountRange] = None, tunnelCategory: Option[Value] = None, timeDependent: Option[Boolean] = None, truckType: Option[Value] = None, vehicleType: Option[Value] = None, trailerCount: Option[TrailerCountRange] = None, maxEngineSizeCC: Option[Int] = None, minEngineSizeCC: Option[Int] = None, maxOccupancy: Option[Int] = None, minOccupancy: Option[Int] = None, restrictedTimes: Option[String] = None, maxKpraLength: Option[Int] = None, maxPayloadCapacity: Option[Int] = None, unconditional: Option[Boolean] = None) extends AVehicleRestrictionTransit with Product with Serializable

    Provides details about the violated restriction and the violated restriction conditions that were evaluated against parameter values set in the routing request (such as vehicle properties).

    Provides details about the violated restriction and the violated restriction conditions that were evaluated against parameter values set in the routing request (such as vehicle properties). The restriction is violated only if all of the conditions present are met.

  343.  case class VehicleSection(id: String, type: Type, preActions: Option[Seq[BaseAction]] = None, actions: Option[Seq[VehicleAction]] = None, language: Option[String] = None, postActions: Option[Seq[VehiclePostAction]] = None, turnByTurnActions: Option[Seq[VehicleAction]] = None, departure: VehicleDeparture, arrival: VehicleDeparture, passthrough: Option[Seq[Passthrough]] = None, summary: Option[VehicleSummary] = None, travelSummary: Option[VehicleTravelSummary] = None, polyline: Option[String] = None, notices: Option[Seq[VehicleNotice]] = None, spans: Option[Seq[VehicleSpan]] = None, routingZones: Option[Seq[RoutingZone]] = None, truckRoadTypes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, incidents: Option[Seq[TrafficIncident]] = None, refReplacements: Option[Map[String, String]] = None, tollSystems: Option[Seq[TollSystem]] = None, tolls: Option[Seq[TollCost]] = None, consumptionType: Option[String] = None, noThroughRestrictions: Option[Seq[VehicleRestriction]] = None, transport: VehicleTransport) extends AVehicleSection with Product with Serializable

    Represent a section of a route

  344.  case class VehicleSpan(offset: Option[Int] = None, length: Option[Int] = None, duration: Option[Int] = None, streetAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, walkAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, carAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, truckAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, scooterAttributes: Option[Seq[String]] = None, tollSystems: Option[Seq[Int]] = None, names: Option[Seq[LocalizedString]] = None, routeNumbers: Option[Seq[LocalizedRouteNumber]] = None, countryCode: Option[String] = None, stateCode: Option[String] = None, functionalClass: Option[Int] = None, speedLimit: Option[Double] = None, maxSpeed: Option[MaxSpeed] = None, dynamicSpeedInfo: Option[DynamicSpeedInfo] = None, segmentId: Option[String] = None, segmentRef: Option[String] = None, consumption: Option[Double] = None, baseDuration: Option[Int] = None, typicalDuration: Option[Int] = None, incidents: Option[Seq[Int]] = None, intersectionIncidents: Option[Seq[Int]] = None, routingZones: Option[Seq[Int]] = None, truckRoadTypes: Option[Seq[Int]] = None, gate: Option[String] = None, railwayCrossing: Option[String] = None, notices: Option[Seq[Int]] = None, noThroughRestrictions: Option[Seq[Int]] = None) extends AVehicleSpan with Product with Serializable

    Span attached to a Section that describes the vehicle content.

  345.  case class VehicleSummary(duration: Int, length: Int, baseDuration: Option[Int] = None, consumption: Option[Double] = None, typicalDuration: Option[Int] = None, mlDuration: Option[Int] = None, tolls: Option[TollSummary] = None, co2Emission: Option[Double] = None) extends AVehicleSummary with Product with Serializable

    Total value of key attributes for a route section.

  346.  case class VehicleTransport(mode: String, name: Option[String] = None, currentWeight: Option[Int] = None) extends AVehicleTransport with Product with Serializable

    Information about a transport

  347.  case class VehicleTravelSummary(duration: Int, length: Int, baseDuration: Option[Int] = None, consumption: Option[Double] = None, typicalDuration: Option[Int] = None, mlDuration: Option[Int] = None, tolls: Option[TollSummary] = None, co2Emission: Option[Double] = None) extends AVehicleTravelSummary with Product with Serializable

    Total value of key attributes for a route section.

  348.  case class VersionResponse(apiVersion: String, serviceVersion: Option[String] = None, dataVersions: Option[Seq[DataVersion]] = None) extends AVersionResponse with Product with Serializable

    Returns the versions of the service components.

  349.  case class ViaNoticeDetail(title: Option[String] = None, cause: Option[String] = None, type: Type, index: Option[Int] = None) extends AViaNoticeDetail with Product with Serializable

    Details about via waypoint.

  350.  case class ViolatedChargingStationOpeningHours(title: Option[String] = None, cause: Option[String] = None, type: Type, openingUnderscorehours: Option[String] = None) extends AViolatedChargingStationOpeningHours with Product with Serializable

    A charging stop was planned at the destination of this section, but the postActions would not be completed within the opening hours.

  351.  case class ViolatedTransportMode(title: Option[String] = None, cause: Option[String] = None, type: Type) extends AViolatedTransportMode with Product with Serializable

    Contains details about the violated transport mode on this road, such as trucks being generally forbidden.

  352.  case class ViolatedTransportModeTransit(title: Option[String] = None, cause: Option[String] = None, type: Type) extends AViolatedTransportModeTransit with Product with Serializable

    Contains details about the violated transport mode on this road, such as trucks being generally forbidden.

  353.  case class ViolatedTruckRoadType(title: Option[String] = None, cause: Option[String] = None, type: Type, truckRoadType: Option[String] = None) extends AViolatedTruckRoadType with Product with Serializable

    Contains details about the violated truck road type on this road.

  354.  case class ViolatedZoneReference(title: Option[String] = None, cause: Option[String] = None, type: Type, routingZoneRef: Option[String] = None, timeDependent: Option[Boolean] = None, restrictedTimes: Option[String] = None, licensePlateRestriction: Option[LicensePlateRestriction] = None, maxWeight: Option[VehicleRestrictionMaxWeight] = None) extends AViolatedZoneReference with Product with Serializable

    Provides details about the zone associated with violatedZoneRestriction and the violated restriction conditions that were evaluated against parameter values set in the routing request (such as vehicle properties).

    Provides details about the zone associated with violatedZoneRestriction and the violated restriction conditions that were evaluated against parameter values set in the routing request (such as vehicle properties). The restriction is violated only if all of the conditions present are met.

  355.  case class WaitAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None) extends AWaitAction with Product with Serializable

    A wait operation to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

  356.  case class WaitPedestrianAction(action: Action, duration: Int, instruction: Option[String] = None) extends AWaitPedestrianAction with Product with Serializable

    A wait operation to be performed at or during a specific portion of a section.

  357.  case class WebLink(id: String, href: Option[String] = None, text: String, hrefText: Option[String] = None) extends AWebLink with Product with Serializable

    The URL address to an external resource.

    The URL address to an external resource.
